title: WPC Timber Tube
shortDescription: Premium WPC timber tube for modern room partitions, ceiling louvers, wall dividers, and office interiors in Gurgaon and Delhi NCR. 100% waterproof, termite-proof, and zero maintenance.
longDescription: Goals Floors provides premium WPC timber tube designs in Gurgaon, Delhi, Noida, and across Delhi NCR for modern home and commercial interiors. Our WPC timber tubes are widely used for room partitions, ceiling louvers, wall dividers, office cabins, staircase paneling, restaurant partitions, and decorative interior designs. Unlike natural wood, WPC timber tubes are 100% waterproof, termite-proof, moisture-resistant, and require zero polishing or maintenance. These timber tubes provide the natural wooden look without cracking, bending, or warping over time. Available in multiple wood finishes like walnut, teak, natural wood, and wenge, our WPC timber tube panels are ideal for luxury living rooms, offices, cafes, hotel lobbies, and commercial interiors. The hidden clip installation system creates a seamless modern finish without visible screws or nails. Whether you need timber tube partitions for a home in Gurgaon or bulk WPC timber tube supply for commercial projects in Delhi NCR, Goals Floors provides premium-quality products with fast delivery and professional installation support.

features.title: 100% Waterproof & Termite Proof
features.description: Completely safe from moisture, wall dampness, and wood-boring insects (termites) for a lifetime of structural safety.

features.title: Zero Polishing Required
features.description: Comes pre-finished with a premium wood-grain texture. No painting, sanding, or varnishing is ever needed.

features.title: Dual-Sided Premium Finish
features.description: Features a beautiful, consistent wooden texture on all sides, making it perfect for open room partitions and visual dividers.

features.title: High Structural Stability
features.description: Made from a high-density composite material that stays perfectly straight and will never warp, bend, or crack like natural wood.

features.title: Seamless Hidden Installation
features.description: Installed using a smart internal clip system, ensuring that no ugly screws or nails are visible on the outside of the tubes.

features.title: Eco-Friendly Design
features.description: Manufactured from sustainable, recyclable materials, giving you a luxury architectural look without harming the environment.

installation: WPC timber tubes are installed using a hidden metal clip system fixed on the floor and ceiling. The hollow timber tube slides over the clips, creating a clean modern finish without visible screws. Installation is fast, dust-free, and suitable for homes, offices, restaurants, and commercial interiors.
maintenance: WPC timber tubes require almost zero maintenance. Simply clean the surface using a dry or slightly wet cloth to remove dust and keep the wood finish looking new for years.

faqs.question: What are WPC Timber Tubes used for?
faqs.answer: They are primarily used to create beautiful, modern room dividers, open partitions, and premium ceiling louver designs in homes and commercial spaces.

faqs.question: What is the price of WPC timber tubes in Gurgaon?
faqs.answer: WPC timber tube prices start from ₹1390 per panel depending on size, finish, and project requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, WPC timber tube or natural wood partition?
faqs.answer: WPC timber tubes are better for modern interiors because they are waterproof, termite-proof, low maintenance, and more durable than natural wood.

faqs.question: Do they look like real natural wood?
faqs.answer: Yes, they feature a deep 3D wood grain texture on all sides. Once installed, they are almost indistinguishable from expensive natural timber.

faqs.question: Will they bend or warp over time like real wood?
faqs.answer: No. Our high-density WPC material is highly stable. It will not warp, bend, or crack under the extreme temperature fluctuations of Delhi NCR.

faqs.question: Do I need to polish them every year?
faqs.answer: Not at all. This is their biggest advantage. They come pre-finished and require zero polishing or painting, saving you significant maintenance costs.

faqs.question: Are they safe from termites (deemak)?
faqs.answer: Yes, WPC is 100% termite and borer proof. Unlike natural wood, insects cannot eat or damage the polymer composite core.

faqs.question: How are they fixed to the floor without showing screws?
faqs.answer: We use a specialized hidden clip system. Metal clips are screwed to the floor and ceiling, and the hollow WPC tube slides over and locks onto them, hiding all the hardware inside.

faqs.question: What is the standard gap to leave between two tubes for a partition?
faqs.answer: For a balanced and elegant look, architects usually recommend leaving a gap of 50mm to 100mm between each tube. This provides privacy while keeping the space feeling open.

faqs.question: Can I use these tubes on the ceiling?
faqs.answer: Yes, they are highly popular for creating 'ceiling louvers'. This design looks incredibly premium and is a great way to hide AC ducts and wiring while keeping them accessible.

faqs.question: Can they be cut to match my exact room height?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. The tubes come in a standard length of 2950mm (approx 9.6 feet) and can be easily cut on-site using a standard wood saw for a perfect floor-to-ceiling fit.

faqs.question: Do you supply these for large commercial projects in Gurgaon and Noida?
faqs.answer: Yes, Goals Floors is a major B2B supplier. We offer dedicated project pricing, bulk discounts, and ready stock for architects, builders, and interior designers across Delhi NCR.

installationSteps.title: Layout Marking
installationSteps.description: Align the floor and ceiling points:
points: Use a laser level or plumb line to mark exact straight vertical points.
Ensure equal spacing between the center of each tube.
installationSteps.tip: Perfect marking is crucial so the tubes don't look crooked or tilted.

installationSteps.title: Fix the Mounting Clips
points: Screw the heavy-duty metal clips firmly into the floor.
Repeat the same process for the ceiling perfectly in line with the floor clips.
installationSteps.tip: For fragile ceilings (like POP), use a long continuous metal channel instead of individual clips.

installationSteps.title: Snap and Lock
points: Slide the hollow WPC timber tube onto the internal metal clips.
Push firmly until the tube locks into place.
Install the matching WPC end-caps at the top and bottom for a seamless, closed finish.
